tools.name: bash_exec
tools.description: Run bash command in the agent workspace only. Absolute paths and parent traversal are blocked.

tools.name: view_game
tools.description: Render a selected observation window from runtime history. Returns PNG for single-frame view, MP4 for dynamic multi-frame window. Use video when tracking motion/change, and single frame when inspecting static details.

from_before.description: Older bound offset from latest observation. 0 means latest.

to_before.description: Newer bound offset from latest observation. 0 means latest.

include_actions.description: Include actions aligned with selected observation steps.

tools.name: todo_write
tools.description: Update todos from the input array: add when id is new, overwrite when id exists.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read a file or directory in the workspace. Supports line offsets and limits and returns line-numbered output for files.

path.description: Workspace-relative path to a file or directory.

limit.description: Maximum number of lines or directory entries to return.

tools.name: grep_text
tools.description: Search file contents in the workspace using ripgrep. Prefer this over shell grep for targeted text search.

path.description: Workspace-relative search root. Defaults to the workspace root.

limit.description: Maximum number of matches to return.

tools.name: list_dir
tools.description: List a workspace directory with stable ordering and entry offsets.

limit.description: Maximum number of directory entries to return.

tools.name: run_deep_analysis
tools.description: Fan out multiple deep-analysis subagents in parallel. The caller provides one objective and one guidance per subagent. Put all needed context and target framing inside guidance.

subagents.description: Subagent spec list. Each entry runs in its own deep-analysis lane.

subagent_id.description: Optional stable identifier for the subagent lane.

objective.description: What this subagent must achieve or answer.

guidance.description: How this subagent should approach the objective. Include all necessary context, constraints, and target framing here.

task_spec.description: Optional structured task metadata passed to the subagent prompt.
Optional shared task metadata merged into every subagent.
